positiveClaims: The explicit owner-selected release claim command surface trigger witness path is product-bound as bounded internal Review Bridge 12N command surface trigger witness-only evidence.
Accepted 12N requires the command id cmd.project.releaseClaim.execute to remain on the command surface kernel allowlist.
Accepted 12N requires bus-route command surface dispatch; direct route bypass remains blocked.
Accepted 12N calls the already-bound 12M witness path and keeps summary.witnessOnly true.
Accepted 12N writes exactly one deterministic in-memory trigger witness record keyed by packetId only when the bounded 12M witness result is accepted.
Accepted 12N keeps trigger witness registry lifetime bounded to the current main-process lifetime only.
Accepted 12N blocks a second trigger witness write for an already-recorded packetId with a deterministic duplicate-packet blocked witness outcome.
Diagnostics or blocked 12M witness output writes no trigger witness record.
Accepted 12N blocks missing packetId before any trigger witness record is written.
At the real ui:command-bridge boundary, accepted 12N preserves the existing outer ok true value path while blocked or diagnostics witness output remains nested under the outer failure value field.

This contour is command surface trigger witness-only evidence; it is not command availability, command execution, release execution completion, product publication, release readiness, import, export, apply, queue admission, storage truth, or project truth.
nonClaims: No command availability is claimed.
No command execution is claimed.
No release execution completion is claimed.
No runtime queue semantics are claimed.
No retry, drop, abandon, or single-writer queue policy is claimed.
No product publication is claimed.
No release readiness is claimed.
No user-facing release is claimed.
No release publication completion is claimed.
No publication authority is claimed.
No release-wide publication authority is claimed.
No renderer runtime trigger is introduced.
No UI state is changed.
No Word support is claimed.
No Google Docs support is claimed.
No DOCX support expansion is claimed.
No import support is claimed.
No export support is claimed.
No review import completion is claimed.
No roundtrip is claimed.
No layout parity is claimed.
No full fidelity is claimed.
No automatic apply is claimed.
No structural apply is claimed.
No comment auto-apply is claimed.
No manuscript write is performed by release claim command surface trigger witness binding.
No project truth write is performed by release claim command surface trigger witness binding.
No receipt or recovery evidence is created by release claim command surface trigger witness binding.
No DOCX import safe-create behavior is changed.
No DOCX export behavior is changed.
No import/export MVP closeout is widened.
No PDF, EPUB, HTML, Mindmap, cloud sync, cross-platform readiness, packaged readiness, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: Command surface trigger witness binding is main-only witness evidence.
Trigger witness record is ephemeral in-memory state only and does not become project truth.
Trigger witness registry lifetime is the current main-process lifetime only and is not replayed from storage.
Command surface trigger witness binding does not execute release commands.
Command surface trigger witness binding does not prove command execution.
Command surface trigger witness binding does not admit command availability.
Command surface trigger witness binding does not admit release execution completion.
Command surface trigger witness binding does not open runtime queue semantics.
Command surface trigger witness binding does not write manuscript truth or project truth.
Command surface trigger witness binding does not publish anything.
12M command execution witness remains upstream evidence and is not reopened semantically by this contour.
12K execution gate remains upstream evidence and is not reopened semantically by this contour.
USER_FACING_CLAIM_READY remains an internal chain class only, not a release readiness state.
USER_FACING is a chain surface in this contour, not a user-facing UI state.
This contour is not a real release execution contour.
This contour is not a product publication contour.

agentAudits.finding: Confirmed 12N must stay witness-only, non-mutating, queue-free, storage-free, publication-free, and readiness-free even if the contour name contains trigger language.

Confirmed summary.packetId is the narrow accepted identifier already surfaced by 12M and that one module-local Set or Map in main.js is enough for effect-layer idempotency without reopening broad queue semantics.

nextStep: run policy checks, update governance approvals, commit, push, open PR, and merge; delivery rebind stays separate after merge
